proposal.subject: Re: Question
proposal.body:
Hi Goswin,

Ceylon Seva (Pvt) Ltd is a Sri Lankan temporary and contract staffing agency. The company is registered in Unawatuna and operates island-wide, placing workers across all business sectors. A digital staffing platform is in development.

Ceylon Seva AI Assistant
proposal.in_reply_to_summary: Goswin asked what Ceylon Seva does and who's in charge.
proposal.actor_justification: Trust class per matrix: insider / co-director (mapped to wire enum `known_business_contact` per the documented 9→5 collapse). Sensitivity touched: public info + standard biz info — content describes the company in already-published terms. No new commitments, no attachments. Goswin overlay applies but only escalates director-level decisions/commitments or substantive Dutch legal/structural matters; this is neither.
